title: CORAX Claude Opus Sentinel Verdict
description: Sentinel V2 Meta Reviewer output. Returned by Agent(general-purpose, opus) call from skill orchestration.

groupthink_risk.description: Sentinel's assessment of how much Producer and Reviewer exhibit homogeneous reasoning.

missed_concerns.description: Items Codex double-review may have missed. Cannot be empty - if truly nothing found, include a minor concern noting suspicious full consensus.

evidence.description: Where in the materials this concern surfaces

verdict_override.description: NONE = let Codex verdict stand. SOFT_VETO = critical concerns require fix cycle but not catastrophic. HARD_VETO = methodology-level failure Codex missed, requires escalate (interactive) or self-solve (auto).

reasoning.description: Detailed reasoning for groupthink_risk and verdict_override. Must be substantive, not just 'looks fine'.

lesson_references.description: CORAX lessons from the lessons DB that informed this review
